posts.title: This website is running !!
posts.content:
Alright, I've done it : my gallery website is finaly a thing- recently I've spent a huge amount of my time building this website and in the end it is working. Having my program to upload content on my own website is a very good thing and I'm proud of this !

You can take my admin tool and whole website code in the zip file under this post so you don't have to suffer like I did, it is okay as long as you give credit my website. You only need python on your PC and the github thing, when it is set up you can double click on main.py in order to have my app and upload all you want once my 2 current albums and posts are deleted.

Feel free to join my discord if you want to talk, you won't see anything at all until I add you to my friend list. You can also support me on Pixiv or Reddit if you want. I am not looking for popularity, my goal here is to produce beautiful illustrations and consume arts

posts.title: Zenith Lee archive
posts.content:
Hi! This post is about my favourite artist.

First, let's start with general infos : His usernames are ZenithLoveNPeace, S. Zenith Lee, or simply Zenith, and he is a Taiwanese artist on the internet. Many of his works are very related to a 2005 imageboard called Komica. He was drawing for a long time, with his earliest archived piece being from December 16, 2001. He has also been on many other imageboards like guro-chan, 4chan, et cetera... but more importantly, he had websites. I will give you the best links to browse his artworks, as those websites are too old and their archives are trash due to the early internet codes he used to host his works. There are more than 500 amazing masterpieces. All the drawings he did are insane, and I love them so much. Not a lot of them are on booru sites, sadly. So now, let me give you a bunch of useful links:

https://web.archive.org/web/20140424074628/http://zenith.love-n-peace.org/coppermine/index.php
- this is his art gallery before quitting.

https://web.archive.org/web/20080327173328/http://zenith.love-n-peace.org/coppermine/index.php
- this is the earliest version of his art gallery.

https://web.archive.org/web/20080427013021/http://zenith.love-n-peace.org/coppermine/thumbnails.php?album=1
- album 1, part 1, his beginning here in 2001.

https://web.archive.org/web/20180220000647/http://zenith.love-n-peace.org/coppermine/thumbnails.php?album=1
- album 1, part 2, up to 2003. He named them "very old pictures".

https://web.archive.org/web/20140425133601/http://zenith.love-n-peace.org/coppermine/thumbnails.php?album=2
- album 2. The 2003 works are "old pictures", already high-level.

https://web.archive.org/web/20130223065154/http://zenith.love-n-peace.org/coppermine/thumbnails.php?album=3
- album 3, from 2006 to 2012, is dedicated to the characters from 東方雲夢譚 (河圖-羅森), which is an original work he did. The art is very enjoyable.

https://web.archive.org/web/20080427013031/http://zenith.love-n-peace.org/coppermine/thumbnails.php?album=3
- the other part of album 3. You will also see lots of amazing covers in there.

https://web.archive.org/web/20090508120238/http://zenith.love-n-peace.org/coppermine/thumbnails.php?album=4
https://web.archive.org/web/20081007085453/http://zenith.love-n-peace.org/coppermine/thumbnails.php?album=4
https://web.archive.org/web/20130223065159/http://zenith.love-n-peace.org/coppermine/thumbnails.php?album=4
- this is the 4th album dedicated to 阿里布達年代祭 (河圖-弄玉), and it dates from 2005 to 2012. Masterpieces as always, and it is actually a series of 54 books he has illustrated like album 3. If you type the title on the internet, you will see many people selling it, but sadly, I cannot discover what it is about at the time of this post. I am so sad that I cannot see more of his works and universe yet.

https://web.archive.org/web/20180220000539/http://zenith.love-n-peace.org/coppermine/thumbnails.php?album=5
- and now we go back in time with album 5, from 2004 to 2006. Those are his illustrations of 龍使 (河圖-閒來無事).

https://web.archive.org/web/20180220002213/http://zenith.love-n-peace.org/coppermine/thumbnails.php?album=6
- album 6 in 2004 has a few fan-art pieces for a 1999 visual novel called 秋之回憶. I find Zenith's drawings amazing; it is such an inspiration to me.

- album 7 is called "car and car picture" and had 60 files in 2008 and 7 more in 2010, but we cannot access this content because it is hidden for "adult content". Dumb when you know that other albums have adult content... I know the password was meant to be "YES" because Zenith did not hide his art. In fact, the username and password of the other site we will see way later are just "gurofriend" and "enter", but the Wayback Machine (internet archive tool) was not able to pass the password system, and therefore it is now lost.

https://web.archive.org/web/20130224020548/http://zenith.love-n-peace.org/coppermine/thumbnails.php?album=8
- album 8 has illustrations of 3886 from Komica. There are also his 5th and 3rd internet website birthday works that have way too many niche characters. You can find more about them with their Danbooru links (linked below). He is one of the only archived artists of Komica. Sadly, a lot of things from the early internet are gone, and the few 3886 arts remaining are on this Wayback Machine page. I did a blog post about 3886 because I managed to find the original thread on a dead Traditional Chinese wiki archive. Here are the links to the Danbooru posts of the birthday arts: https://danbooru.donmai.us/posts/297778 and https://danbooru.donmai.us/posts/735284 .

https://web.archive.org/web/20180219235340/http://zenith.love-n-peace.org/coppermine/thumbnails.php?album=9
- album 9 is a random illustration dump from the first "3rd year", with yukkuri (Touhou 2chan meme), to Pixiv uploads (we'll see that later, near the end), which are the most recent pre-2nd website artworks he has done.

- album 10 is gone, and we can't know anything about it. He made it in 2009, but it's hard to link stuff between the art gallery and the 1st website because the archive is a massive maze. I've seen works from this album, but I can't explain it.

- album 11 from 2009 had 6 files, but for the same reason as album 7, it is lost.

https://web.archive.org/web/20180220002227/http://zenith.love-n-peace.org/coppermine/thumbnails.php?album=12
- album 12 is the K-ON folder (2009). Those few fan-art pieces are pretty cute!

https://web.archive.org/web/20180220003053/http://zenith.love-n-peace.org/coppermine/thumbnails.php?album=13
- album 13 has nothing interesting (speculative technology drawings). It is his "last" album in the gallery. To be honest, album 9 is where the last stuff actually is. And now, let's go somewhere more interesting....

https://web.archive.org/web/20070805124859/http://zenith.love-n-peace.org/bblog/
https://web.archive.org/web/20090220182518/http://zenith.love-n-peace.org/bblog/
https://web.archive.org/web/20110325193024/http://zenith.love-n-peace.org/bblog/
- okay, so I'd rather start with his 2nd website, which is the blog, because it does not have as much content as the 1st one, and the 1st one was hosted during the same time (pre-gallery to Pixiv), except that this one ended way before Pixiv and is related to lots of guro_chan lost content, which is too hard to find now. On the blog, he actually wrote all his posts, so we can read his own words for the first time. You'll see the guro from 2007, when he started the blog, to his last posts after the abandonment of the blog, named "three years later" and "valentine" in 2013: https://web.archive.org/web/20160625133530/http://zenith.love-n-peace.org/bblog/?postid=26

https://web.archive.org/web/20080512073402/http://zenith.love-n-peace.org/wp/
- while he did all the commissions for people on imageboards, guro on bblog, etc... this is the website where literally everything is. In fact, the art gallery I've showcased was inside the 1st website. All his internet footprint except bblog and Pixiv is here on his old coded website from 2008 to 2013. Zenith said this site died from it when he did the gallery/first website return of 2018 before shutting it down with the following note: "Awakening from frozen sleep (?) When I look back at it, it's been a long time since I've been able to break through the net page (I've had a breakthrough in a few years). The webpage is not unexpectedly returned to the continuation of the meeting, but it is not yet renewed (excluding the original work and starting the editing again); Pixiv. https://pixiv.me/szenithlee" (https://web.archive.org/web/20180712020820/http://zenith.love-n-peace.org/wp/)

https://www.pixiv.net/en/users/861227
- the Pixiv account has his last works, 38 files up to 2018. His digital footprint ended in 2020 on Pixiv when he posted a picture of his desktop in his Pixiv biography.

I don't believe he died because it was only 6 years ago, or stopped because of the 4chan harasser, since he never cared about people being mad at him for guro art pieces (or futa pornography; he was treated as a troll for it on art websites), and his identity wasn't leaked. He probably stopped drawing in his life because he was tired of it. I did this archive of his internet history because I really enjoy all of his creations and mostly his style, which inspires me. My goal was to allow an easy navigation of his content for his other enjoyers and for my future audience to discover my main inspiration, as I have started art in late 2025. I'm writing this in February 2026, and I hope years from now my art will be as good as his art. Thank you for reading my post. My goal has now been achieved, and from now on, it's been a pleasure.

posts.title: Komica 3886 archive
posts.content:
First, let's start with general infos: Komica is a 2005 imageboard for Taiwanesse people like Futaba Channel (2chan). Here the users are anonymous and many original characters were born from random posts and inside jokes. 3886 is one of those characters : she comes from a message on the Moe board on June 3, 2006. I always thought that the original thread was lost but while randomly browsing archive of a traditional chinese websites, I unexpectedly managed to find the original discussion. On the early internet Komica, they had their own lore of island full of lolikon girls and original characters, it would be an erotic theme between the few users there were before the website gained any popularity. 3886 is one of those islander, she represents a child-luring character with a very cute caring big sister figure. We'll now see the origin of this character, here is the original thread translated :

/with a picture of a short loli having her clothe taken away and crying to get it back

No. 3875 > I'm not giving it back~ 

No. 3878 > Not giving it back, not giving it back, crying won't help. (smirking)

No. 3880 > Trade your panties for it. (joking)

No. 3881 > Trade your chastity instead. (deadpan)

No. 3883 > Don't cry, don't cry. Here's a lollipop. (takes off pants)

No. 3886 > You boys are really cold-hearted. = = big sister is here for you~~ (hug)

No. 3887 > 3886 Pfft!! (dies from a nosebleed)

No. 3889 > Big sister, come over here too.

No. 3893 > 3886 made me melt completely. =////=

No. 3895 > The moment 3886 appeared, the moe level went off the charts.

No. 3897 > Why do I think 3886 is even cuter than the picture? =.='

No. 3900 > After reading No. 3886's post... My brain started resonating. OTL

No. 3905 > 3886 is cuter than the picture... Though a certain scene flashed through my mind...

No. 3906 > 3886 made me right-click.

No. 3907 > 3886 has already been saved as a TIFF!

No. 3910 > Someone take off my pants so 3886 will come after me too... I think there's an 80% chance I'll get killed... Mysterious Voice 1: I'd like to correct you... Mysterious Voice 2: I'd like to modify you... Mysterious Voice 3: I'd like to prune you...

No. 3915 > How has 3886 not become a legend yet?

No. 3918 > Looks like, ever since all the KOMICA guys were added to the list, we've finally got our first "female". Though... what title should we give her? (grinning) (yuri attribute exploding)

No. 3927 > I wonder what 3886 would think if she saw this thread.

No. 3934 > 3886 is so unbelievably cute!!

No. 3959 > Put 3886 into my archives!

No. 3961 > I can't stop imagining it...

No. 3968 (No. 3886 herself) > Uh... what on earth happened here? @@||| It was just my first instinct... Seeing a poor little girl getting bullied naturally made me want to comfort and protect her.

No. 3974 > You just happened to hit the islanders' moe weak spot~ Big sister, hug me too~~~~ (gets punched away)

No. 3978 (No. 3886) > 3974 -口-.... I only hug cute little girls and boys.

No. 3998 > I didn't mean to take it... 'hug' my apologies, 'hug' my apologies. (/A pun on the Chinese word for sorry)

Alright, this is the conversation that created the character for No. 3886 ! The cuteness of this user made one of many Komica's inside character. I know about 3886 because of the many Zenith's arts featuring her. Under this post you'll have a full local copy of the thread's webpage in chinesse and also a text document which is a list of Komica's and chinese internet's slangs if you want to go there. Thank you for reading my documentation !
